utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 of these items. Each item is fully specified with a description and explicit costs (monthly/annual where applicable). Therefore, all 5 items are present and detailed in accordance with the required format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes: (1) health_coverage with physical and mental health, preventive cardiac screening, mental health, family therapy, and reduced international deductibles — this matches the 'EliteCare Premium Plan' or 'PrimeCare Premium Plan' for both physical and mental health (both rated 10). It also references preventive care and family therapy, corresponding to 'Preventive Care Package' (rating 8) and 'Family Therapy Coverage' (rating 8). (2) property_coverage mentions high-value home contents, fine art, electronics — this aligns with 'EliteHome Premium Coverage' or 'PrimeHome Premium Coverage' (both rated 10). (3) travel_coverage includes international luxury travel, adventure coverage, emergency evacuation, and reduced co-pays — this matches 'EliteTravel Premium Plan' or 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan' (both rated 10), plus 'Adventure Travel Coverage' (rating 8) from travel enhancements. (4) additional_services mentions concierge services and global assistance — this maps to 'Concierge Services' (rating 7) and possibly '24/7 Travel Assistance' (rating 9).
